job_description: A security guard assigned to the Async Research Station.
A senior researcher at the Async Research Station.
A maintenance engineer at the Async Research Station.

dynamic_line: Answer my question first... Where did you come from?

responses.text: I don't really know. It's hard to tell in this place. I am human though. Who is Dr. Chen?
I'm sorry but I need to get out of here.

dynamic_line: Chen, like the rest of us here, were hired to map this place out. Sadly our threshold was compromised in a catastrophic failure that I don't have the time or mental energy to talk about right now... you showed up at a terrible time. Dr. Chen went to the routing room, this room with nothing but rows of data racks and open space, to grab the sensor data. Hours ago. You can't hide in that room. It's just cables and blinking lights and nowhere to go. I have a strong feeling that you're not going find a living human but- if you can get to the server room and secure that research data, we might be able to figure out what went wrong.

responses.text: I'll go check on him and try to secure that data.
I'm not a hero. Fuck that.

yes.yes: Oh, so he didn't make it... but you got the research. That's... that's something. Thank you. I don't know what else to say.
yes.no: You came back. Did you find anything in the server room? Anything at all?

Oh, it's you again. What's up? You find any weird rooms? Honestly, I'm just glad someone's still walking around. Just... if you see Dr. Chen, tell him I'm looking for him. And if you find anything useful in the server room, let me know. I'm stuck here trying to keep the lights on.

dynamic_line.no: Dr. Chen— oh, Jesus Christ, who are you? For a second I thought— doesn't matter. You're not Chen. Where the hell did you come from? Look, I don't know you, and I don't know how you got here, but people are disappearing. Dr. Chen went to the server room hours ago and never came back. The whole facility is falling apart. Please, just... go to the server room. See if you can find anything. Anything at all. I'll explain more if you come back.

responses.text: Here's the data drive. Chen's work.
I'll go check the server room.
Who's Dr. Chen? What happened here?
Not yet, still looking.
I don't have time for this.

yes.yes: Oh, so he didn't make it... but you got the research. That's... that's something. Thank you. I don't know what else to say.
yes.no: You came back. Did you find anything in the server room? Anything at all?

dynamic_line.no: Oh, it's you again. What's up? You find any weird rooms? Honestly, I'm just glad someone's still walking around. Just... if you see Dr. Chen, tell him I'm looking for him. And if you find anything useful in the server room, let me know. I'm stuck here trying to keep the lights on.

responses.text: Here's the data drive. Chen's work.
I'll go check the server room.
Not yet, still looking.
I don't have time for this.

dynamic_line: Oh, it's you again. Look, I still don't know who you are, but I don't have the energy to be surprised anymore. This place is falling apart, people are disappearing, and I've got nothing left but a bad feeling. Just... please. Go to the server room. Find Chen's data. Whatever happened here, we need to understand it. I'm begging you.

responses.text: I'll go check the server room.
I'm still looking.
I don't have time for this.

dynamic_line: Oh! Another survivor... that's odd timing... doesn't seem like a coincidence but... this whole place makes no sense.

responses.text: Yeah this place is disturbing.
Can you come with me?
I'll stay out of your way.

yes.yes: Is that an Async data drive? So you went to the server room. Then you've seen what's happening. I need to get out of this lab for a while, it's driving me insane in here. But I don't want to be alone. Can I travel with you?
yes.no: You found the server room? No? Then what are you doing wandering around here? There's nothing for you to find in this wing.

dynamic_line.no: Help? You don't even know what you're walking into. Neither did Chen. Neither did any of us. Come back when you understand what you're really asking for.

responses.text: Let's go...
Wait here.
Not yet. I'm not ready.
I'll figure this place out first. Stay safe.
Um... hi?
Sorry, wrong room.

dynamic_line: ... I haven't seen you around here before. Are you even real? Go talk to Reynolds.

responses.text: Okay.
